member.name: T:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OutputCaching.StackExchangeRedis.RedisOutputCacheOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Redis based output cache.

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OutputCaching.StackExchangeRedis.RedisOutputCacheOptions.Configuration
member.summary: The configuration used to connect to Redis.

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OutputCaching.StackExchangeRedis.RedisOutputCacheOptions.ConfigurationOptions
member.summary: The configuration used to connect to Redis. This is preferred over Configuration.

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OutputCaching.StackExchangeRedis.RedisOutputCacheOptions.ConnectionMultiplexerFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets a delegate to create the ConnectionMultiplexer instance.

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OutputCaching.StackExchangeRedis.RedisOutputCacheOptions.InstanceName
member.summary: The Redis instance name. Allows partitioning a single backend cache for use with multiple apps/services. If set, the cache keys are prefixed with this value.

member.param: The reference type argument to validate as non-null.

member.summary: Throws an if is null or empty.
member.param: The argument to validate as non-null and non-empty.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.StackExchangeRedisOutputCacheServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for setting up Redis output cache related services in an .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.StackExchangeRedisOutputCacheServiceCollectionExtensions.AddStackExchangeRedisOutputCache(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.AspNetCore.OutputCaching.StackExchangeRedis.RedisOutputCacheOptions})
member.summary: Adds Redis output caching services to the specified .
member.returns: The so that additional calls can be chained.
